channel.title: Speedy REST API feed
channel.description: Speedy REST API news and features
channel.author: Speedy JSCo.

item.title: Additional explanation of some errors was introduced in the "Speedy REST API examples" page.
item.description: Additional explanation of some errors was introduced in the "Speedy REST API examples" page.

item.title: A new property "goods" and a new structure "GoodsItem".
item.description: A new property "goods" and a structure "GoodsItem" were added in the "parcel" section of the "Create Shipment" request. They should be used for parcels due to customs control. For more information, contact your company representative.

item.title: Added new properties
item.description:
• A new property "valueType" was introduced in the "ParcelToPrintAdditionalBarcode" structure.
  • A new property "printAdditionalBarcode" was introduced in the "ShipmentContent" structure.
  • A new property "printAdditionalBarcode" was introduced in the "ShipmentParcel" structure.

item.title: Added new exception codes
item.description:
A few new used exception codes for tracking operations were added in the documentation:
  • 1018 Sender drop-off in office
  • 1019 Sender not present
  • 9014 Closed national roads
  • 9015 Delay at border crossing
  • 9016 Severe weather conditions
  • 9017 Traffic accident

item.title: The description of operation code 1134 was changed.
item.description: The description of the operation code 1134 was changed from "Office/Locker ready for pickup message sent" to "Notification sent for parcel in office/locker".

item.title: Added new operation and modified the exception codes description.
item.description:
• A new operation 136 - "Clarify shipment delivery was" added. Read more: Track And Trace Operation Codes.
  • The table with the exception codes was modified with a description of which operation codes appear for some operation types. Read more: Exception Codes for Track and Trace Operations.

item.title: Added new structures "RoutingInformation" and "Tour".
item.description:
• A new structure named "RoutingInformation" was added in the "Office" structure.
  • A new structure named "Tour" was added in the "RoutingInformation" structure.

item.title: Deprecated "printAdditionalBarcode" property.
item.description: The "printAdditionalBarcode" property in the "Shipment Content" structure was deprecated.
